description: REST API for the Paperclip AI agent management platform

tools.name: adapters_create
tools.description: Install an adapter. Required: packageName. Optional: isLocalPath, version. Returns the new AdaptersCreateResponse.

tools.name: adapters_delete
tools.description: Delete an adapter. Required: type. Returns the AdaptersDeleteResponse. Destructive.

tools.name: adapters_get

tools.name: adapters_list

tools.description: Enable or disable an adapter. Required: type, disabled. Returns the updated AdaptersUpdateResponse.
